name: AstraWash7PIX
comment:
Astra Wash7Pix is a compact and fast LED moving wash light. Despite its small size, it comes with an extensive feature set which can typically only be found on bigger luminaires.
Based on a 40W Osram RGBW LED light source, the unit features an extremely high-efficient optical system capable of zooming from 4° to 59°, making it extremely versatile for any application as beam or wash light.
Astra Wash7Pix is single pixel controllable, with multiple on-board FX, and allows access to a precise and advanced white and colour control, all through DMX, W-DMX, Art-Net, sACN and RDM.

capabilities.comment: Ethernet to DMX ON (Main Fixture 2 DMX)
Ethernet to DMX ON (Pixel Engine 2 DMX)
Input to WDMX ON (Main Fixture to WDMX)
Input to WDMX ON (Pixel Engine to WDMX)
Ethernet to DMX ON (Main Fixture 2 DMX)
Ethernet to DMX ON (Pixel Engine 2 DMX)
Input to WDMX ON (Main Fixture to WDMX)
Input to WDMX ON (Pixel Engine to WDMX)
